'''Sheekla Farrs''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ferroan]] living on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. Her husband was [[Shappa Farrs|Shappa]]. An airship [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], she was tall and muscled.

Although she and her husband were injured in the [[First Battle of Zonama Sekot]], they both recovered for the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
